meaning: adj.辉煌的,灿烂的,光辉的,华丽的
examples: Bessie, resplendent in royal blue velvet, was hovering beside the table.
He glimpsed Sonia, resplendent in a red dress.
Jesse was looking resplendent in a fine pin-striped suit, and I kidded him about dressing up like a Republican today for the Speaker.
Many travellers come to Tokyo to sample a forward-thinking city resplendent with myriad technical wonders.
Most coveted of all are the pallasites, resplendent with extraterrestrial gemstones fixed in a nickel-iron matrix.
